mapper.sql: l.id, l.operator_id, u.nickname AS operator_name, l.module, l.action, l.target_id, l.result, CAST(l.detail_json AS CHAR) AS detail_json, l.trace_id, l.created_at
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM operation_log
WHERE module = #{module}
SELECT FROM operation_log l LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON u.id = l.operator_id ORDER BY l.created_at DESC, l.id DESC LIMIT #{limit}
